steps.t: Hildith is in the jail of Grimslade. You should speak with Hildith.
Hildith is in the jail of Grimslade. You should speak with Hildith.
Hildith has gone to the front gate of Grimslade. You should speak with Hildith.
Hildith is at the front gate of Grimslade.
The half-orc who was moments ago a prisoner of Grimslade now stands before the gates of town. You should speak with the prisoner.
Elfhelm is with Hildith at the gate of Grimslade.
